MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100043313) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOZNIAK, PAUL

LAW AND MOTION 302,PLAINTIFF PAUL WOZNIAK'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND [PROPOSED] CONSENT JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PAUL WOZNIAK'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH THE REQUIREMENTS FOR PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENTS UNDER HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 25249.7. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE WARNINGS REQUIRED BY THE SETTLEMENT COMPLY WITH HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTIONS 25249.5-25249.14; THE AWARD OF ATTORNEY'S FEES IS REASONABLE UNDER CALIFORNIA LAW; AND THE PENALTY AMOUNT IS REASONABLE BASED ON THE CRITERIA SET FORTH IN HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 25249.7(B)(2). ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-03-2019 Vacated

Notice Of Application For Order To Show Cause Re Contempt And Motion To Enforce Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-24-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

PLAINTIFF PAUL WOZNIAK Notice Of Application For Order To Show Cause Re Contempt And Motion To Enforce Judgment is OFF CALENDAR per request of the moving party.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: not reported.

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment
Off Calendar May-08-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PAUL WOZNIAK's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff Paul Wozniak's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements under Health & Safety Code section 25249.7. The Court finds that the warnings required by the settlement comply with Health & Safety Code sections 25249.5-25249.14; the award of attorney's fees is reasonable under California law; and the penalty amount is reasonable based on the criteria set forth in Health & Safety Code section 25249.7(b)(2).

Oeer and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2019 Set For Trial On Oct-28-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
